name: Agent Tool ACL
description: Restricts MCP server tool access per agent via a JSON allowlist.

aclPath.description: Absolute path to acl.json. Defaults to acl.json in the installed plugin root.

uiEnabled.description: Enable the browser-based permission editor UI (served at uiPath). Default: true.

uiPath.description: URL path prefix for the Web UI. Default: /agent-acl-ui/.
